metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace exposing the cc-enslaver discipline plugin.

plugins.name: cc-enslaver
plugins.description: A Claude Code plugin and LLM-agnostic rule pack that enforces systematic thinking, verified citations, and root-cause analysis — eliminating reactive, lazy AI behavior. v0.12 adds 圣旨 (Imperial Edicts) — user-defined per-project hard rules (.claude/cc-enslaver/edicts.toml) with PreToolUse(Edit|Write|Bash) DENY + CRUD slash command, reformats Stop block reasons as uniform 6-row status tables, and thins soft-layer prompts 54%.
